place: Layan, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Four-Bedroom Clifftop Villa with Andaman Sea Views - Layan
note: Full staff · private chef · daily breakfast
blurb: A four-bedroom clifftop villa high above Phuket's west coast in tranquil Layan, opening across two levels to sweeping views of the Andaman Sea — with an infinity pool and sun terrace behind folding glass, warm interiors of teak, stone and marble, and a resident team, a short drive from the beach clubs and restaurants of the coast.
detail:
High above the shoreline in the quiet Layan area on Phuket's west coast, this four-bedroom villa commands sweeping views of the Andaman Sea. Its clifftop position makes it feel wonderfully secluded — wrapped in tropical greenery and sea breeze — while the beach clubs and fine dining of the west coast stay within easy reach.

The residence is arranged for effortless, open-plan living across two levels. Floor-to-ceiling bifold doors slide back to the infinity pool and sun terrace, framing the horizon, and the interiors carry a warm, grounded character: teak wood, natural stone and sandstone floors set against copper-brass accents and polished marble.

Days settle into an easy rhythm — a barbecue by the pool, a movie night in the living pavilion, or the sea views from the terrace at dusk — with four en-suite bedrooms sleeping up to eight and a resident team looking after the details.

features.l: Infinity pool & sun terrace over the sea
Andaman Sea views across two levels
